description:

title: Anthem to drop Meridian Health Services from Medicaid network
description:
Indianapolis-based Anthem Inc. will end its relationship with Meridian Health Services for Medicaid patients late next month, the Muncie-based health system said Thursday.

title: Grant to fuel expansion of healthy food access for families at Evansville schools
description:
The University of Evansville's Center for Innovation & Change is leading a new initiative to expand access to health food, nutrition education and family engagement programs in the Evansville Promise Neighborhood.

title: Indy Boat Co. to mark opening of $6.5M Pendleton facility
description:
Indy Boat Co. will hold a grand opening ceremony Saturday for its new, 75,000-square-foot facility in Pendleton, which it says is one of the largest marine service centers in central Indiana.

title: Keystone Cooperative selects Scott Logue to lead nearly $3B agricultural co-op
description:
Scott Logue has been selected as the next CEO of Indianapolis-based Keystone Cooperative. Logue will succeed Kevin Still, who is retiring Sept. 1 after more than 40 years in the agriculture cooperative industry.

title: Indiana SNAP payment error rate rises
description:
Indiana’s payment error rate for the nation’s largest anti-hunger program rose last year — which, without improvements, could cost the state more than $140 million annually as soon as next year.
